maintain.name: Hex of Malice
maintain.note: 24 sec Shadow DoT/Curse; Bad Juju gains a -20% healing debuff when the target is affected by it

maintain.name: Spirit
maintain.note: stacking regen collected by Shadow Puppets, Hexfire (via Voodoo Spirits) and Puppeteer's Grasp; keep stacks flowing to fuel Hexfire/Bad Juju damage

procs.name: Puppeteer's Grasp
procs.when: on cooldown as a 30 sec Spirit-generating window (grants a Spirit every 2 sec) - lets you cast Malefic Wrath and Bad Juju while moving

Voodoo.st: Keep Hex of Malice on the target, then spend on cooldown: Bad Juju and Shadow Puppets to collect Spirits, and Hexfire (which scales with Spirit) as the filler/dump; use Voice of Bwonsamdi and Soul Marionette as burst cooldowns.
Voodoo.aoe: Soul Marionette adds an AoE stun/explosion burst window; otherwise spread Hex of Malice and use Shadow Puppets on multiple targets.
Voodoo.summary: Keep Hex of Malice up. ST: Bad Juju / Shadow Puppets to collect Spirits -> Hexfire dump. CD: Voice of Bwonsamdi.

maintain.name: Ingredient: Bloodthistle
maintain.note: Cauldron/Potion ingredient buff; Mojo abilities swap active ingredients that apply lasting ally buffs

procs.name: Mojo: Jungle Thistle
procs.when: resets Potion Toss / Splash Potion so the next use within 5 sec applies Jungle Thistle

procs.name: Mojo: Fish Bones
procs.when: resets Potion Toss / Splash Potion so the next use within 5 sec applies Fish Bones

procs.name: Mojo: Frog Shrooms
procs.when: resets Potion Toss / Splash Potion so the next use within 5 sec applies Frog Shrooms

Brewing.st: Support/brew spec with no damage builder-spender loop in the data: swap ingredients with the Mojo abilities and follow with Potion Toss, then use Master Mixologist and Voodoo Cauldron as major cooldowns.
Brewing.summary: Brew/support spec: swap Mojo ingredients, then Potion Toss; Master Mixologist and Voodoo Cauldron as cooldowns.

maintain.name: Eye of Kimbul
maintain.note: critical strikes apply it for 15 sec, stacking 5 times, raising your damage and crit vs the target

maintain.name: Spirit
maintain.note: collected by Reclamation; consumed by Spirit Eclipse and Frenzied Spirits, so keep Spirits stacked before spending

procs.name: Frenzied Spirits
procs.when: when you have Spirits stacked - consumes them for crit and self-heal and regenerates 1 Spirit/sec while active

Shadowhunting.st: Build Spirits with Reclamation, then spend them with Spirit Eclipse (damage scales per active Spirit); weave Spirit Glaive and Malefic Arrow, and keep Eye of Kimbul stacks up.
Shadowhunting.aoe: Spirit Glaive and Spirit Eclipse both cleave nearby enemies (Spirit Eclipse explodes on impact, Spirit Glaive strikes everything it passes through); Call of Sseratus adds AoE Serpent Wards.
Shadowhunting.summary: Build Spirits with Reclamation -> spend with Spirit Eclipse. AoE: Spirit Glaive / Spirit Eclipse cleave.
